notes: Built from the 2026-07-16/17 click audit (137 interactions) + source sweep. Status values reflect the state AFTER the fix campaign of 2026-07-17. Findings marked FIXED cite the fix; DEFERRED items need an owner decision.

elements.label: New Lead / New Project / New Invoice / Approval / Reports
Send
elements.expected: Sends chat to Cortex; graceful owner-readable error when all LLM providers fail
elements.finding: FIXED: raw JS internals no longer leak into the chat error (cortex.js)

elements.label: Voice input
elements.expected: Toggles speech capture; accessible name present
elements.finding: FIXED: aria-label added

elements.label: PIN setup/confirm/unlock
elements.expected: Setup persists; reload locks app; wrong PIN errors; correct PIN unlocks
elements.finding: FIXED P0-1: RequireUnlock gate now enforces the PIN on every load once configured (was: /dashboard rendered with no auth check anywhere)

elements.label: Add New Lead (10 fields)
elements.expected: Validation blocks empty; Calculate Score works; Save adds row with correct columns
elements.finding: FIXED: dev-preview store legacy 11-param branch shifted email→Source, phone→Budget, score→0 (core.js)

elements.label: Kanban Pipeline
elements.expected: Leads appear as cards bucketed by status
elements.finding: FIXED via store column repair — statuses were corrupted so no card matched any column

elements.label: Archive lead
elements.expected: Lead hidden from active list, visible in archived view, flag persisted
elements.finding: FIXED: store had no UPDATE archived handler and ignored WHERE archived filters

elements.label: FTS5 search
elements.finding: DEFERRED: needs desktop verification (leads_fts virtual table absent in harness)

elements.label: Lead detail drawer
elements.expected: Tabs, note add, status change, Lead Magnet, delete all work

elements.label: Dial Phone
elements.expected: Opens tel: link to the lead's phone
elements.finding: FIXED: was an alert() stub faking the dial

elements.label: CSV Import
elements.finding: File injection not possible in harness

elements.label: Category → Service → 3-field gate → 16-tier pipeline
elements.expected: Gate enables CTA at 3 fields; tiers run via runWorker with approval gating
elements.finding: FIXED P0-2: critical tiers now suspend on owner approval; standard tiers queue a record (was: label-only, workers always ran)

elements.label: System log
elements.expected: No duplicate React keys under same-ms writes
elements.finding: FIXED: Date.now() key → crypto.randomUUID()

elements.label: + menu Attach group
elements.expected: Visibly disabled with 'Soon' tag until implemented
elements.finding: FIXED: stubs looked enabled, revealed 'coming soon' only after click

elements.label: CriticalApprovalModal
elements.expected: Auto-opens on pending critical; approve/reject/changes resolve; NO fabricated countdown when expires_at is null
elements.finding: FIXED: countdown replaced with 'No Timeout — waits for your decision' for critical (C1)

elements.label: GlobalApprovalWatcher
elements.expected: Pending critical approvals pop up on ANY screen, not just /approvals
elements.finding: FIXED P0-2 companion: new app-level watcher, e2e-covered (global-approval.spec.js)

elements.label: Simulate Message / templates
elements.expected: APPROVE/REJECT <id> round-trip resolves the right record
elements.finding: FIXED: store WHERE-by-id now honored (was: any ID matched the first row)

elements.label: Sidebar Approvals count
elements.expected: Updates within one 4s poll of resolution
elements.finding: FIXED: store ignored WHERE status='pending' so the count never changed in browser mode

elements.label: Add to Calendar
elements.expected: Creates draft content item; success/error message shows either way
elements.finding: FIXED: silent no-op → store handler added + role=status feedback message

elements.label: Refresh Data
elements.finding: FIXED: was wired to a prop name ScreenHeader never reads (onActionClick vs onPrimaryClick)

elements.label: Project card
elements.expected: Selects inline control panel; 'Open full view' navigates to /projects/:id
elements.finding: FIXED: no path to the detail screen existed anywhere in the app

elements.label: Stage columns
elements.finding: DnD unreliable in harness without full CSS; verify on desktop

elements.label: Project header/progress
elements.expected: Loads the real project by :id; demo content only as labeled fallback
elements.finding: FIXED: screen ignored :id and always rendered 'Orion Labs' demo; now DB-backed with an explicit 'Demo data' badge on fallback

elements.label: Add expense
elements.finding: FIXED: store had no expenses handlers (silent loss in browser mode)

elements.label: Add Retainer
elements.finding: FIXED: store handlers added

elements.label: Generate Report
elements.expected: Recomputes KPIs + weekly verdict from live DB
elements.finding: FIXED: had no handler at all

elements.label: Export PDF
elements.expected: Saves a jsPDF reality-check summary via the shared file service
elements.finding: FIXED: had no handler at all

elements.label: New Workflow
elements.expected: Opens name modal; creates Draft workflow via addWorkflow
elements.finding: FIXED: primary CTA was wired to undefined — workflows could not be created from the UI

elements.label: Reset Layout
elements.finding: FIXED: had no handler

elements.label: Node canvas
elements.expected: Workflow select renders nodes/edges; connect works

elements.label: Worker Logs / LLM Usage / System Health
Expert Consult
elements.finding: FIXED: had no handler; footer mic/send remain feature-undefined (DEFERRED)

elements.label: Filter Category
elements.finding: FIXED: had no handler

elements.label: Add Client (9 fields)
elements.finding: FIXED: store had no clients handlers (modal closed as success while data vanished)

elements.label: API Credentials / MCP Hub / DB Maintenance / cPanel / Ops
Set Up Lock
elements.finding: Expected behaviour, not a defect

elements.label: 1,294-line screen
elements.expected: OWNER DECISION: route it (and fix hardcoded localhost:5173 preview + alert-stub deploy) or remove it
elements.finding: DEFERRED — per 'never cut features' rule, not removed without owner sign-off

navigation.label: 11 items: Dashboard, Playground, Marketing Studio, Leads, Projects, Clients, Money, Workers, Internal Tools, Approvals(badge), Settings
Unknown route
navigation.finding: FIXED: previously a fully blank page

navigation.label: Ctrl+K palette (single handler), Ctrl+Shift+A/D/I, Ctrl +/-/0 zoom

flows.name: PIN setup → relock on reload → unlock
Pending critical approval pops up anywhere → approve persists
Service intake → T1 standard tier runs unblocked
